item.itunes:author: ayrahikari
item.itunes:summary:
Infinix Apps Port
(Utilities)
Infinix XOS Apps Port, can be used for any rom than XOS.
Requirements based on main thread

item.title: CRMONE [File Management]
item.itunes:title: CRMONE [File Management]
item.itunes:author: crmone
item.itunes:summary:
CRMONE
(File Management)
Are you in search of a comprehensive CRM software catering to all your business needs? Look no further-CrmOne, your one-stop solution. CrmOne allows you to automatically save leads data, create user journey, & teams come together to create a single platform for unprecedented sales efficiency. From creating a free website to generating & getting richer insights,nurturing warm leads,creating contact profiles, managing deals,tracking conversations,scheduling appointments,automating workflows & even simplifying your social media posting-CrmOne offers it all seamlessly integrated into one powerful platform. We are focused on delivering you a CRM tool that can significantly boost your revenue without breaking the bank. Strategies, sales, or software — CrmOne allows you to simplify your company. No more juggling between multiple tools. With CrmOne, you have everything you need in a single, user-friendly package.

[read more]
item.description:
CRMONE
(File Management)
Are you in search of a comprehensive CRM software catering to all your business needs? Look no further-CrmOne, your one-stop solution. CrmOne allows you to automatically save leads data, create user journey, & teams come together to create a single platform for unprecedented sales efficiency. From creating a free website to generating & getting richer insights,nurturing warm leads,creating contact profiles, managing deals,tracking conversations,scheduling appointments,automating workflows & even simplifying your social media posting-CrmOne offers it all seamlessly integrated into one powerful platform. We are focused on delivering you a CRM tool that can significantly boost your revenue without breaking the bank. Strategies, sales, or software — CrmOne allows you to simplify your company. No more juggling between multiple tools. With CrmOne, you have everything you need in a single, user-friendly package.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
CRMONE
(File Management)
Are you in search of a comprehensive CRM software catering to all your business needs? Look no further-CrmOne, your one-stop solution. CrmOne allows you to automatically save leads data, create user journey, & teams come together to create a single platform for unprecedented sales efficiency. From creating a free website to generating & getting richer insights,nurturing warm leads,creating contact profiles, managing deals,tracking conversations,scheduling appointments,automating workflows & even simplifying your social media posting-CrmOne offers it all seamlessly integrated into one powerful platform. We are focused on delivering you a CRM tool that can significantly boost your revenue without breaking the bank. Strategies, sales, or software — CrmOne allows you to simplify your company. No more juggling between multiple tools. With CrmOne, you have everything you need in a single, user-friendly package.

[read more]

item.title: Removable Disk Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Removable Disk Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: laptopsdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Removable Disk Repair Software
(Utilities)
Download removable disk repair software that make sure recovery of all your priceless data stuck on corrupted USB drive. USB drive file restore wizard undelete all digital data after an accidental deletion, a format process, or from corrupt media. Professional removable disk recovery software is most efficient data recovery utility that performs read-only operations on your removable media and stores the recovered files to the location you specified. Utility support recovery from wide quality of portable USB media storage devices such as zip drive, key chain disk, USB drive, memory chip, compact flash card, jump drive, portable laptop hard drive, removable music storage disc, thumb drive and other similar mass data storage disc. Crashed data recovery software provide support to major capacity USB drives including 64MB, 128MB, 256MB, 512MB, 1GB, 2GB, 4GB and 8GB. Easy to use software works with Microsoft Windows platform (from Windows 11, 10, 8 and etc). Mass storage media folders recovery tool provides a cutting-edge GUI that support quick view and easy to operate facility. Software can recover damaged picture, photos, images and music songs like mp3, mp4, wav, gif, bmp, tiff, jpeg etc.Features:* Download removable disk recovery software to restore all type of data whether it is office documents, music files or any other folder detail.* Software restores all lost files and data from USB drive until data have been overridden, and also recovers data from formatted pen drives.* Removable media file recovery tool supports data recovery from all kind of USB drives available in market.* Software is available with free trial version, giving you the ability to see whether your data is recoverable or not.

[read more]
item.description:
Removable Disk Repair Software
(Utilities)
Download removable disk repair software that make sure recovery of all your priceless data stuck on corrupted USB drive. USB drive file restore wizard undelete all digital data after an accidental deletion, a format process, or from corrupt media. Professional removable disk recovery software is most efficient data recovery utility that performs read-only operations on your removable media and stores the recovered files to the location you specified. Utility support recovery from wide quality of portable USB media storage devices such as zip drive, key chain disk, USB drive, memory chip, compact flash card, jump drive, portable laptop hard drive, removable music storage disc, thumb drive and other similar mass data storage disc. Crashed data recovery software provide support to major capacity USB drives including 64MB, 128MB, 256MB, 512MB, 1GB, 2GB, 4GB and 8GB. Easy to use software works with Microsoft Windows platform (from Windows 11, 10, 8 and etc). Software can recover damaged picture, photos, images and music songs like mp3, mp4, wav, gif, bmp, tiff, jpeg etc.Features:* Download removable disk recovery software to restore all type of data whether it is office documents, music files or any other folder detail.* Software restores all lost files and data from USB drive until data have been overridden, and also recovers data from formatted pen drives.* Removable media file recovery tool supports data recovery from all kind of USB drives available in market.* Software is available with free trial version, giving you the ability to see whether your data is recoverable or not.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Removable Disk Repair Software
(Utilities)
Download removable disk repair software that make sure recovery of all your priceless data stuck on corrupted USB drive. USB drive file restore wizard undelete all digital data after an accidental deletion, a format process, or from corrupt media. Professional removable disk recovery software is most efficient data recovery utility that performs read-only operations on your removable media and stores the recovered files to the location you specified. Utility support recovery from wide quality of portable USB media storage devices such as zip drive, key chain disk, USB drive, memory chip, compact flash card, jump drive, portable laptop hard drive, removable music storage disc, thumb drive and other similar mass data storage disc. Crashed data recovery software provide support to major capacity USB drives including 64MB, 128MB, 256MB, 512MB, 1GB, 2GB, 4GB and 8GB. Easy to use software works with Microsoft Windows platform (from Windows 11, 10, 8 and etc). Mass storage media folders recovery tool provides a cutting-edge GUI that support quick view and easy to operate facility. Software can recover damaged picture, photos, images and music songs like mp3, mp4, wav, gif, bmp, tiff, jpeg etc.Features:* Download removable disk recovery software to restore all type of data whether it is office documents, music files or any other folder detail.* Software restores all lost files and data from USB drive until data have been overridden, and also recovers data from formatted pen drives.* Removable media file recovery tool supports data recovery from all kind of USB drives available in market.* Software is available with free trial version, giving you the ability to see whether your data is recoverable or not.

[read more]

item.title: Disk Repair Utilities [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Disk Repair Utilities [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: laptopsdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Disk Repair Utilities
(Utilities)
FAT data recovery software is a complete package to rescue data lost due to FAT partition deletion or even in the case if system is showing error messages like Disk not Found, Disk Read Failure, Drive not detected while accessing hard drive. It is a cost-effective data recovery solution for windows to have easy retrieval and restoration of erased files and folders from FAT partitioned mass storage disk drives. Lost files rescue tool works up to the mark in case data deleted due to partition missing, or formatted hard drive, emptied Recycle Bin, deletion due to Shift+Del command, virus infection, unexpected shutdown and other unknown reasons, so if you want to do recovery using data salvage program then FAT Deleted File Recovery is a perfect utility that we recommend. The software comes with help manual which does not require any technical skills for operating software with its simple GUI wizard. So if you have any trouble with your computer due to lost or corrupted data then we recommend you FAT deleted file recovery software which is 100% free to try.FAT data backup tool possess following features:*Restore data lost due to corrupted FAT partitions in all logical crash. *Recover files even in worst cases when system generates error message Drive not formatted.*Recover data even if drive is accidentally formatted or re-formatted. *Get lost data back from previously existing hard drive partitions. *Supports all major hard disk drive manufactures including Western digital, Quantum, IBM, Seagate, Toshiba etc.*Offers recovery of deleted files and folders even after emptied recycle bin folder or Shift +Del keys used to delete data.*Recovery of files, pictures, videos, emails along with their original path possible through the software.*Interactive GUI interface and easy to use for non technical users.

[read more]
item.description:
Disk Repair Utilities
(Utilities)
FAT data recovery software is a complete package to rescue data lost due to FAT partition deletion or even in the case if system is showing error messages like Disk not Found, Disk Read Failure, Drive not detected while accessing hard drive. It is a cost-effective data recovery solution for windows to have easy retrieval and restoration of erased files and folders from FAT partitioned mass storage disk drives. Lost files rescue tool works up to the mark in case data deleted due to partition missing, or formatted hard drive, emptied Recycle Bin, deletion due to Shift+Del command, virus infection, unexpected shutdown and other unknown reasons, so if you want to do recovery using data salvage program then FAT Deleted File Recovery is a perfect utility that we recommend. The software comes with help manual which does not require any technical skills for operating software with its simple GUI wizard. So if you have any trouble with your computer due to lost or corrupted data then we recommend you FAT deleted file recovery software which is 100% free to try.FAT data backup tool possess following features:*Restore data lost due to corrupted FAT partitions in all logical crash. *Recover files even in worst cases when system generates error message Drive not formatted.*Recover data even if drive is accidentally formatted or re-formatted. *Get lost data back from previously existing hard drive partitions. *Supports all major hard disk drive manufactures including Western digital, Quantum, IBM, Seagate, Toshiba etc.*Offers recovery of deleted files and folders even after emptied recycle bin folder or Shift +Del keys used to delete data.*Recovery of files, pictures, videos, emails along with their original path possible through the software.*Interactive GUI interface and easy to use for non technical users.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Disk Repair Utilities
(Utilities)
FAT data recovery software is a complete package to rescue data lost due to FAT partition deletion or even in the case if system is showing error messages like Disk not Found, Disk Read Failure, Drive not detected while accessing hard drive. It is a cost-effective data recovery solution for windows to have easy retrieval and restoration of erased files and folders from FAT partitioned mass storage disk drives. Lost files rescue tool works up to the mark in case data deleted due to partition missing, or formatted hard drive, emptied Recycle Bin, deletion due to Shift+Del command, virus infection, unexpected shutdown and other unknown reasons, so if you want to do recovery using data salvage program then FAT Deleted File Recovery is a perfect utility that we recommend. The software comes with help manual which does not require any technical skills for operating software with its simple GUI wizard. So if you have any trouble with your computer due to lost or corrupted data then we recommend you FAT deleted file recovery software which is 100% free to try.FAT data backup tool possess following features:*Restore data lost due to corrupted FAT partitions in all logical crash. *Recover files even in worst cases when system generates error message Drive not formatted.*Recover data even if drive is accidentally formatted or re-formatted. *Get lost data back from previously existing hard drive partitions. *Supports all major hard disk drive manufactures including Western digital, Quantum, IBM, Seagate, Toshiba etc.*Offers recovery of deleted files and folders even after emptied recycle bin folder or Shift +Del keys used to delete data.*Recovery of files, pictures, videos, emails along with their original path possible through the software.*Interactive GUI interface and easy to use for non technical users.

[read more]

item.title: YT-Vanced [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: YT-Vanced [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: yograjsingh-cmd
item.itunes:summary:
YT-Vanced
(TV & Streaming)
Vanced/Revanced versions of youtube.
Details:
- use premium features without premium membership

Steps:
1. install microg
2. install youtube/yt-music

* just can't use download features
[read more]

YT-Vanced
(TV & Streaming)
Vanced/Revanced versions of youtube.
Details:
- use premium features without premium membership

Steps:
1. install microg
2. install youtube/yt-music

* just can't use download features

item.title: USB Flash Drive Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Flash Drive Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
USB Flash Drive Recovery
(Utilities)
Advance digital camera data retrieval software helps to restore your missing photos, snapshot, clips, music files and other media data from USB storage drive within few minutes. USB Flash Drive Recovery utility easily use by any user for regaining and restoring accidentally deleted files and folders data from pen drive without any expert guidance.

[read more]
item.description:

(Utilities)
Advance digital camera data retrieval software helps to restore your missing photos, snapshot, clips, music files and other media data from USB storage drive within few minutes. USB Flash Drive Recovery utility easily use by any user for regaining and restoring accidentally deleted files and folders data from pen drive without any expert guidance.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
USB Flash Drive Recovery
(Utilities)
Advance digital camera data retrieval software helps to restore your missing photos, snapshot, clips, music files and other media data from USB storage drive within few minutes. USB Flash Drive Recovery utility easily use by any user for regaining and restoring accidentally deleted files and folders data from pen drive without any expert guidance.

[read more]

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

item.title: Restore Accidentally Deleted Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Accidentally Deleted Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: laptopsdatarecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Accidentally Deleted Files
(Utilities)
Windows NTFS data uneraser utility repairs all logically crashed hard drive, rescue hidden data and safely restore at user define location in hard disk. Vista partition files recovery tool support recovery of all audio video picture formats like MOV, WAV, JPG, JPEG, GIF, RIFF, TIFF, PSD, AVI, TIF, PNG, BMP, 3gp, MPEG, xls, ppt, doc, html, txt etc. NTFS partition files rescue software provides complete data restoration solution for corrupted files, folders and lost data from your all type hard drives including SATA, PATA, EIDE, IDE, ATA, SCSI. Hard disk NTFS files rescue utility can repair bad sectors of hard disk, damaged partition tables etc. Windows Vista NTFS partition undelete program recovers damaged partition folders, partition tables, misplaced files, Master boot records and Dos boot records from crashed laptop hard drives. Vista NTFS files undelete software provides highly attractive user friendly graphical user interface (GUI) by which everyone can recover own data and files from hard drive very easily. Windows disk NTFS data rescue tool provides fastest turnaround time to recover lost data or undetected files and folders from your hard drive.Features:* Vista NTFS backup manger provides support to recover deleted files and folders even if they are deleted using (Shift + Del) key or emptied recycle bin of your system.* Recovery Software is easily executable on all Microsoft windows operating system including windows 11, 10, 7, 8 and XP.* Quick windows Vista NTFS file recovery utility supports data retrieval from NTFS, NTFS5 disk partitions.* Data undelete program undelete your accidently erased USB hard drive NTFS partition files like doc, riff, tiff, text, gif, and jpeg files with advanced features.* Easy to use application enables user to carry recovery process by self without any need of technical guidance.* Software is capable to retrieve previous deleted files from disaster stricken computer disk.

[read more]
item.description:
Restore Accidentally Deleted Files
(Utilities)
Windows NTFS data uneraser utility repairs all logically crashed hard drive, rescue hidden data and safely restore at user define location in hard disk. Vista partition files recovery tool support recovery of all audio video picture formats like MOV, WAV, JPG, JPEG, GIF, RIFF, TIFF, PSD, AVI, TIF, PNG, BMP, 3gp, MPEG, xls, ppt, doc, html, txt etc. NTFS partition files rescue software provides complete data restoration solution for corrupted files, folders and lost data from your all type hard drives including SATA, PATA, EIDE, IDE, ATA, SCSI. Hard disk NTFS files rescue utility can repair bad sectors of hard disk, damaged partition tables etc. Windows Vista NTFS partition undelete program recovers damaged partition folders, partition tables, misplaced files, Master boot records and Dos boot records from crashed laptop hard drives. Vista NTFS files undelete software provides highly attractive user friendly graphical user interface (GUI) by which everyone can recover own data and files from hard drive very easily. Windows disk NTFS data rescue tool provides fastest turnaround time to recover lost data or undetected files and folders from your hard drive.Features:* Vista NTFS backup manger provides support to recover deleted files and folders even if they are deleted using (Shift + Del) key or emptied recycle bin of your system.* Recovery Software is easily executable on all Microsoft windows operating system including windows 11, 10, 7, 8 and XP.* Quick windows Vista NTFS file recovery utility supports data retrieval from NTFS, NTFS5 disk partitions.* Data undelete program undelete your accidently erased USB hard drive NTFS partition files like doc, riff, tiff, text, gif, and jpeg files with advanced features.* Easy to use application enables user to carry recovery process by self without any need of technical guidance.* Software is capable to retrieve previous deleted files from disaster stricken computer disk.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Restore Accidentally Deleted Files
(Utilities)
Windows NTFS data uneraser utility repairs all logically crashed hard drive, rescue hidden data and safely restore at user define location in hard disk. Vista partition files recovery tool support recovery of all audio video picture formats like MOV, WAV, JPG, JPEG, GIF, RIFF, TIFF, PSD, AVI, TIF, PNG, BMP, 3gp, MPEG, xls, ppt, doc, html, txt etc. NTFS partition files rescue software provides complete data restoration solution for corrupted files, folders and lost data from your all type hard drives including SATA, PATA, EIDE, IDE, ATA, SCSI. Hard disk NTFS files rescue utility can repair bad sectors of hard disk, damaged partition tables etc. Windows Vista NTFS partition undelete program recovers damaged partition folders, partition tables, misplaced files, Master boot records and Dos boot records from crashed laptop hard drives. Vista NTFS files undelete software provides highly attractive user friendly graphical user interface (GUI) by which everyone can recover own data and files from hard drive very easily. Windows disk NTFS data rescue tool provides fastest turnaround time to recover lost data or undetected files and folders from your hard drive.Features:* Vista NTFS backup manger provides support to recover deleted files and folders even if they are deleted using (Shift + Del) key or emptied recycle bin of your system.* Recovery Software is easily executable on all Microsoft windows operating system including windows 11, 10, 7, 8 and XP.* Quick windows Vista NTFS file recovery utility supports data retrieval from NTFS, NTFS5 disk partitions.* Data undelete program undelete your accidently erased USB hard drive NTFS partition files like doc, riff, tiff, text, gif, and jpeg files with advanced features.* Easy to use application enables user to carry recovery process by self without any need of technical guidance.* Software is capable to retrieve previous deleted files from disaster stricken computer disk.

[read more]

item.title: Recovery Data USB Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recovery Data USB Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Recovery Data USB Drive
(Utilities)
Easy to download Recovery Data USB Drive application available at www.usbflashdriverecovery.org that is cost effective solution to regain lost or deleted official files and folders from various types of usb removable storage devices. File restore tool is capable to restore misplaced official documents even after system prompts error message “media not formatted” or “drive not recognized” on your screen.

[read more]
item.description:

File restore tool is capable to restore misplaced official documents even after system prompts error message “media not formatted” or “drive not recognized” on your screen.

[read more]

item.title: Android Photo Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android Photo Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbdriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Android Photo Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Recovery Software provided by www.usbflashdriverecovery.org site for restoring crashed video file in less time from cell phone devices. Android Photo Recovery Software is used to retrieve corrupt photographs due to human error from smart phones.

[read more]
item.description:
